zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Montagu於1333年出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親William Montagu32歲，母親Catherine Grandison17歲。她和Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1381年1月5日在英國英格蘭波克夏比善姆享年48歲，埋葬在英國波克夏比善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Montagu was born in 1333, in Somerset, England, her father, William Montagu, was 32 and her mother, Catherine Grandison, was 17. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March. She died on 5 January 1381, in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Bisham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Montagu est née en 1333, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Montagu, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Catherine Grandison, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March. Elle est décédée le 5 janvier 1381, à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Bisham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England: Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Montagu 1333 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Montagu 32 und ihre Mutter Catherine Grandison 17. Sie hatte mit Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Januar 1381 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Bisham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bisham, Berkshire, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March. Morì il 5 gennaio 1381, nel Bisham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Bisham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Montaguが1333年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父William Montaguは32歳，母Catherine Grandisonは17歳であった。彼女はRoger Mortimer 2nd Earl of Marchとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1381年1月5日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアビシャムで48歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアビシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Montagu(이)가 1333년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Montagu(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Grandison(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 1월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 비샤에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 비샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Montagu nasceu em 1333, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Montagu, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Grandison, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March. Ela faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1381, em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Bisham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Montagu родилась в 1333 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Montagu было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Grandison, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Roger Mortimer 2nd Earl of March. Она умерла 5 января 1381 г. в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности бишам, биркшир, Англия.
